items.title: Stone Security monitoring invoice — confirm Infusive account
items.summary: Yanina paid installation invoices with AmEx but needs clarification on which account the monitoring invoice is for (Infusive vs VYVE) to arrange proper payment method.
items.actionNeeded: Confirm monitoring invoice is for Infusive account so Yanina can complete payment.

items.title: 2MM onboarding — assets and weekly meeting schedule
items.summary: Project manager Janelle needs brand assets uploaded and wants to schedule recurring meetings: Thursdays 3pm ET with team (30 min) and Tuesdays 12pm ET with Hank (60 min). Will requested Mondays/Fridays instead of clinical days Tues/Thurs.
items.actionNeeded: Work with EA to upload brand assets to shared folder and finalize weekly meeting times with 2MM team.

items.title: Podcast recording with Jason Wright tomorrow 1pm CT
items.summary: Zoom link provided for The Healthy CEO Show podcast recording scheduled for June 15, 2026 at 1pm Central (2pm ET). Interview Valet coordinated and requested promotion once episode publishes.
items.actionNeeded: Join Zoom meeting tomorrow at 1pm CT for podcast recording with Jason Wright.
